hero.sub: I build production-grade React and Next.js applications for SaaS teams. Specializing in performance optimization, scalable architecture, and frontends that convert trial users into paying customers.

about.title:
I build systems
that scale.
about.p1: Most frontend engineers can ship features. I ship systems — architecture that holds up under real user load, design patterns a team can inherit without pain, and performance work that shows up in the metrics that matter.
about.p2: My background in Chemical Engineering shaped how I think: find the constraint, eliminate waste, measure the result. I apply that same rigor to every codebase. When I led a TypeScript migration that reduced runtime defects by 30%, it wasn't about syntax — it was about shared confidence across the team.
about.p3: I'm based in Lagos, Nigeria and work exclusively with remote teams across the US, UK, and Europe. Available for full-time roles and frontend sprint contracts.

experience.title: Where I've shipped.
experience.subtitle: 6+ years across startups, YC-backed companies, and high-growth remote teams.

glovez.blurb: B2B SaaS startup building business software for the African market. Joined as an early engineer, scaling from pre-launch MVP to production.
bullets: Eliminated a full category of runtime errors and reduced production defects by **30%** by leading a cross-application TypeScript migration that increased type coverage across the entire frontend codebase.
Grew organic traffic by **40%** by engineering performance-first Next.js applications, directly improving Core Web Vitals scores and search engine rankings.
Cut deployment time by **66%** (30 min → <10 min) by architecting containerized CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker, enabling faster, more confident releases.
Accelerated feature delivery and reduced UI code duplication by **30%** by designing a standardized Tailwind CSS component system adopted across the engineering team.

gitstart.blurb: Y Combinator-backed platform that embeds vetted engineers into remote teams to accelerate shipping velocity.
bullets: Improved merge velocity and codebase maintainability for high-growth engineering teams by delivering production-ready pull requests and complex React component refactors across multiple client codebases.
Reduced new feature implementation time by rebuilding legacy UI into a reusable, Storybook-documented component library, enforcing design consistency and reducing cross-team duplication.
Increased release frequency and cut manual release errors by automating CI/CD workflows and containerized deployments using GitHub Actions and Docker.
Reduced production regressions and improved uptime by introducing comprehensive Jest unit tests and Cypress E2E test coverage across all client applications.
Improved user engagement and reduced bounce rates on high-traffic real estate platforms by optimizing JavaScript bundle sizes and implementing React lazy loading and code-splitting strategies.
Increased lead capture and search visibility by shipping SEO-optimized Next.js pages with structured data, semantic HTML, and Core Web Vitals improvements aligned to client acquisition KPIs.
Shortened release cycles and caught regressions earlier by building automated CI/CD pipelines and a frontend test automation suite covering all critical user flows.
Standardized engineering practices across a growing team by producing technical documentation and onboarding guides, reducing new-hire ramp time from day one.
Built responsive, WCAG-compliant React UI components for Quick Credit, a micro-lending platform, translating complex designs into production-ready code.
Maintained MVP feature quality by implementing Test-Driven Development (TDD) with Mocha and Chai inside an agile sprint environment with daily code reviews.

projects.title: Selected work.
projects.subtitle: Production applications I've designed and built — each with real users, real metrics.

fabspace.desc: AI-powered platform connecting design engineers, purchasing managers, and EMS providers. Built dynamic user flows, third-party AI integrations, and a responsive SaaS dashboard from the ground up.

protronics.desc: Performance- and SEO-first corporate site for a US-based contract manufacturing firm. Achieved strong Core Web Vitals through code-splitting, lazy loading, and structured data.
protronics.metric: ⚡ Improved Core Web Vitals · SEO optimized

vision.desc: AI-powered image Q&A tool built with Cloudinary for asset management and Google Gemini for vision inference. Built the full Q&A flow and image-handling pipeline end-to-end.

cloudi.desc: Structured, project-based DevOps training platform. Built an accessible, responsive learning UI with course progression, content modules, and a clean enrollment experience.

testimonial.quote: Emmanuel is an exceptional software developer with an excellent grasp of programming languages and frameworks — JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js. He possesses a strong understanding of the software development lifecycle and the ability to solve complex problems with efficiency and clarity. I have no doubt he will be a valuable addition to any team.
testimonial.name: Chilo Nwokolo
testimonial.title: Software Engineer · Compute Essentials Inc.

contact.title:
Let's work
together.
contact.availability: Currently open to remote roles & contracts
contact.body: Whether you're hiring for a senior frontend position or need a focused sprint to ship faster — I'd like to hear what you're building.
contact.email_body: The fastest way to reach me. I respond within 24 hours on business days.

pricingPage.hero_sub: Pick a plan that fits your stage. All packages include a written contract, clear deliverables, and a developer who treats your project like his own.
pricingPage.pkg_subtitle: Transparent, value-based pricing — no hidden fees, no surprises.
pricingPage.growth_f0: Up to 10 pages or single-feature app
pricingPage.retainer_desc: Keep your product healthy and evolving. Ideal for businesses that need ongoing frontend support without hiring full-time.
pricingPage.payment_body: A 40–50% deposit is required before work begins. The remaining balance is due upon delivery and your approval. Every project is backed by a written contract covering scope, timeline, and revision limits.
pricingPage.table_sub: Every feature, laid out side by side.
pricingPage.process_sub: From first contact to final delivery — a simple, transparent workflow.
pricingPage.process_s0_desc: We discuss your goals, timeline, and scope. I ask the questions others won't.
pricingPage.process_s1_desc: You receive a detailed proposal with clear deliverables, pricing, and a binding written contract.
pricingPage.process_s2_desc: 40–50% upfront secures your slot. Development begins immediately after deposit.
pricingPage.process_s3_desc: Regular progress updates. Structured feedback rounds are built into every milestone.
pricingPage.process_s4_desc: Final payment, handover, deployment, and post-launch support as agreed in the contract.
pricingPage.faq_sub: Everything you need to know before we get started.
pricingPage.faq_q0: How does the scoping process work?
pricingPage.faq_a0: Every project starts with a free 30-minute discovery call where we discuss your goals, timeline, and technical requirements. From there I draft a detailed proposal outlining deliverables, milestones, and cost — all before any commitment is made.
pricingPage.faq_q1: What counts as a revision round?
pricingPage.faq_a1: A revision round is a consolidated batch of feedback on a completed phase of work. Each round covers all feedback on that phase together — not individual back-and-forth comments. This keeps the project moving and ensures feedback is thoughtful and complete.
pricingPage.faq_q2: Do you work with international clients?
pricingPage.faq_a2: Absolutely. I work with clients in the US, UK, Europe, and across Africa. Communication is fully remote via email, Slack, or Zoom. Global pricing is quoted in USD for simplicity, and payment can be made via Wise or international bank transfer.
pricingPage.faq_a3: A 40–50% deposit is required before work begins. The remaining balance is due upon final delivery and your approval. For Nigerian clients, payment is via local bank transfer. For international clients, Wise or SWIFT transfers are accepted. No work begins without a signed contract.
pricingPage.faq_q4: Can I upgrade my package mid-project?
pricingPage.faq_a4: Yes. If your scope grows during development, we assess the additional work, agree on a fair price for the added scope, and amend the contract accordingly. Scope changes are documented as formal change orders to protect both parties.
pricingPage.faq_q5: What happens after the project ends?
pricingPage.faq_a5: Each package includes post-launch support as specified. After that, you can continue with a monthly retainer for ongoing maintenance and feature development, or contract individual pieces of work as needed. You own all code and assets outright upon final payment.
pricingPage.faq_a6: Yes, I sign NDAs and confidentiality agreements before project commencement at no additional cost. Client data, business logic, and proprietary information are always treated with full discretion.
pricingPage.quote_sub: Tell me what you're building. I'll respond within 24 hours with a clear path forward.
pricingPage.quote_email_body: The fastest way to reach me. I respond within 24 hours on business days.
pricingPage.quote_note: All projects start with a free 30-minute discovery call.
